posts.title: Modelling Battery Dispatch in Energy Markets using Python
posts.description: A practical walkthrough of two-stage linear programming for battery storage dispatch optimization across ERCOT's Day-Ahead and Real-Time markets — with perfect-foresight results across Q1 2025.
posts.excerpt: Real-time flexibility added 32–55% on top of day-ahead revenue. A linear program finds the globally optimal schedule — no heuristic gets close.
posts.imageAlt: Battery dispatch optimization across ERCOT DA and RT markets

posts.title: How the Iran Conflict Affects the Global Energy Markets
posts.description: The Iran conflict erased the 2026 LNG surplus in seven days, exposing the structural fragility of Gulf energy dependence - and why the energy security case for distributed generation has never been stronger.
posts.excerpt: In seven days, a single geopolitical event restructured global energy markets in ways that will take years to fully price in.
posts.imageAlt: LNG tanker on open water - global energy supply routes

posts.title: TB4 Spread Futures: ERCOT vs CAISO — Hedging the Battery Revolution
posts.description: An analysis of TB4 spread futures across ERCOT and CAISO trading hubs — exploring pricing premiums, forecasting accuracy, and hedging implications for battery storage operators navigating an increasingly arbitrage-driven market.
posts.excerpt: ERCOT's TB4 hubs averaged 48.5% premium over CAISO, but with proportionally higher volatility. Early lessons from TB4 futures for BESS operators.
posts.imageAlt: TB4 Monthly Settlement Paths — ERCOT vs CAISO

posts.title: ERCOT Battery Monitor 2024: Market Analysis and Revenue Trends
posts.description: The ERCOT energy storage market has experienced significant transformation in 2024, with revenue dropping from $18/kW-month to $7/kW-month. This analysis examines the key trends and their implications for battery storage operators.
posts.excerpt: Analysis of ERCOT energy storage market transformation and revenue patterns in 2024
posts.imageAlt: ERCOT Battery Market Analysis - Top Assets by Month
